eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 11:22 AM on AUG 14, 2019 Effective until 11:52 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, this only a TEST from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office. This is a test, this only a TEST from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office.
